positive: A majestic, symmetrical celestial mandala integrating bioluminescent flora and cosmic nebulae. The central motif features stylized, ornate deep purple and teal mandalas interwoven with geometric, crystalline leaves and floating nebula clusters. The composition must be perfectly centered, with clear, bold outlines and flat, graphic color blocking suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use a dark background (navy/black) to maximize contrast. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern minimalist vector art. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, highly symmetrical, perfect repeating pattern potential.
